audit_items.proof_trace: Withdrawal balance increments and Gwei-to-Wei conversion (amount * 10^9) are implemented entirely in the external alloy-evm library (v0.20.1 from crates.io). Reth only passes withdrawal context through EthBlockExecutionCtx; it contains no code that processes withdrawals or manipulates balances. Test at crates/ethereum/evm/tests/execute.rs::test_balance_increment_not_duplicated verifies correct behavior.
